title: SWEET CHILD O MINE
content:
[Intro]
| D   | D   | D7  | D7  |
 
[Verse]
D
He's got a smile that it seems to me
  Cadd9
Reminds me of childhood memories
      G                                         D
Where everything was as fresh as a bright blue sky
D
Now and then when I see his face
   Cadd9
He takes me away to that special place
    G                                                 D
And if I stared too long I'd probably break down and cry
 
[Chorus]
Am   Cadd9               D
Whoa oh, Sweet child of mine
Am            F        C/E      D
Whoa, oh, oh, oh Sweet love of mine
 
[Instrumental]
D   Cadd9   G   D
 
[Verse]
D
He's got eyes of the bluest skies
   Cadd9
As if they thought of rain
  G                                D
I hate to look into those eyes and see an ounce of pain
D
His hair reminds me of a warm safe place
       Cadd9
Where as a child I'd hide
    G
And pray for the thunder and the rain
   D
To quietly pass me by
 
[Chorus]
Am   Cadd9               D
Whoa oh, Sweet child of mine
Am            F        C/E      D
Whoa, oh, oh, oh Sweet love of mine
Am          Cadd9              D
Oh, oh, oh, oh sweet child of mine
Am            F        C/E      D
Whoa, oh, oh, oh Sweet love of mine
 
[Solo]
Em   C   Bm7   Am   x2
Em   G   Am   C   D   x2
 
[Outro]
Em             G                  Am              C  D
Where do we go, Where do we go now, Where do we go
Em             G                  Am              C  D
Where do we go, Where do we go now, Where do we go
Em            G             Am                 C  D
Where do we go, Sweet child, Where do we go now
Em                  G                Am                    C  D
Aih, Aih, Aih Aih, Aih, Aih, Aih Aih, where do we gooooooooooooo
Em              G              Am                C  D
Where do we gooo, sweet child, where do we go now
Em             G        Am                 C  D
Where do we goooooooooo, where do we go now
Em             G    Am                   C           D          Em
Where do we go,      where do we go now now-now-now-now-now-now-now
       G              Am  C  D      Em
Sweet child, sweet chi . . . ld of mine

X
